title: Collaboration, mail, calendar, polls, notifications, and mobile lifecycle contract
nonClaimPolicy: G007 proves repository, contract, browser-contract, native-surface, CI, and targeted regression readiness only. Live SMTP/IMAP delivery, push provider delivery, production mobile signing, Argo/live host proof, screenshots/traces, and issue closure remain reserved for G009.

routePaths.requiredStory: Group, org, department, team, and personal collaboration hub must combine messenger, mail, calendar, polls, approvals, and object links with badge lifecycle without nonfunctional explanatory walls.
Messenger must support thread list, read receipts, unread badges, search, realtime reconnect, Enter send, latest-message focus, mentions, and object-linked evidence paths.

Mail client must support platform-operated corporate mailbox folders, unread filters, safe HTML, attachments, send/reply/forward threading, read-state lifecycle, auto-provisioning/readiness states, and permission denial without tenant SMTP/IMAP server configuration.

dependencyRoutes.requiredStory: Work Hub depends on G007 collaboration unread threads, mail status, notification badges, and object-linked communications while preserving G005 approval lifecycle.
Approvals depend on collaboration notifications, mobile passkey-sensitive approval decisions, and comments/evidence staying attached to source objects.

backendContracts.contract: Messenger REST must expose thread creation/listing, message paging/sending, read receipts, member discovery, and search under authenticated tenant scope.
Messenger application layer must keep unread/read state, work-order thread linkage, audit action names, and post-commit message notifications explicit.
Messenger persistence must be RLS/audit armed and own list/page/send/read/search behavior against durable messenger tables.
Messenger storage must remain audit-grade: durable threads, members, messages, attachments, read receipts, search, and no raw evidence bytes in messages.
Corporate mail REST must separate account-admin and mail-use features, expose folders/threads/messages/read-state/attachments, and support send/reply/forward.
Mail application layer must preserve write-only secrets, rate limits, SMTP/IMAP lifecycle, reply/forward threading, read-state audit, attachments, and sync/read DTOs.
Mail persistence must RLS-arm reads, audit writes/read-state, sync folders/messages/attachments idempotently, and preserve unread aggregates/search.
Mail schema must define tenant-scoped accounts, folders, threads, messages, attachments, unread/search indexes, and object-link indexes.
Mail send/test endpoints must have per-org/per-user fixed-window rate counters to prevent abuse and accidental mail storms.
Calendar and poll foundations must be durable, audited, scoped, object-linkable, vote-tracked, append-only for history, and RLS-ready.
Push/Alimtalk provider seam must carry idempotency keys and provider IDs so urgent work, approval, messenger, mail, calendar, and poll notifications can be deduped.
Transactional email provider must support live OCI SMTP via STARTTLS and a stub sender that logs OTPs without sending in dev/test.

frontendContracts.contract: Collaboration hub must load work orders, approvals, daily plans, calendar events, polls, messenger threads, and mail threads with scoped creation/vote actions.
Messenger UI must implement thread selection, read receipts, realtime updates, search, @mention rendering, Enter send, latest-message scroll/focus, and evidence attachment linkage.
Messenger reducer must preserve deterministic message/thread ordering, unread increments, mark-read state, realtime events, and resume cursor behavior.
Messenger realtime client must build authenticated ws/wss URLs with resume cursor and close/disconnect handling.

Mail UI must implement folders, unread filter, safe body rendering, attachments, compose/send/reply/forward, read-state toggles, and platform-operated auto-provisioning/readiness states without SMTP/IMAP server configuration links.
Work Hub must include collaboration notifications by pulling actionable messenger threads, approvals, support, and mail status into the object/action inbox without stale closed items.
Mail HTML sanitizer must strip scriptable/dangerous markup before rendering untrusted inbound mail.
Navigation must expose corporate mail only as a MailUse-gated mailbox and must hide the legacy external SMTP/IMAP server configuration route because mailbox hosting is platform-operated.
requiredSnippets: tenant-visible SMTP/IMAP server configuration nav item

frontendContracts.contract: Mail route access must deny users without MailUse and return them to Work Hub instead of showing mailbox data.

mobileContracts.contract: iOS field app must surface Work Hub, messenger, operations notifications, approvals with comments, mail, calendar, polls, and passkey-sensitive actions.
iOS view model must refresh mobile operations, require passkey envelopes for approvals/polls, mark notifications read, and send/search/read messenger messages.
iOS core operations repository must expose approval, mail, calendar, poll, notification inbox, passkey step-up, cached fallback, and poll vote flows.
iOS API gateway must call generated client endpoints for mail, calendar, polls, approvals, messenger, passkey, and work-order evidence without bespoke divergent APIs.
Android operations repository must mirror approval, mail, calendar, polls, notifications, passkey-sensitive action, cache fallback, device registration, and location ping flows.
Android messenger repository must load/search/send/mark-read and queue offline messages for replay instead of losing field messages.
Android UI must expose Work Hub collaboration actions, messenger, operations notifications, approval comment/passkey queue, mail, calendar, and poll vote flows.
Generated Kotlin client must include mail, collaboration, messenger, approval, and passkey endpoints used by mobile code.

safetyAssertions: Closed/terminal items must not remain actionable in Work Hub or collaboration badges.
Messenger Enter sends only plain Enter; Shift+Enter preserves newline and disabled composer cannot send blank messages.
Latest sent/received message must scroll/focus so the user sees the newest message after send or realtime delivery.
@mention text is rendered as mentions without breaking safe display or raw UUID fallbacks.
Messenger read receipt transitions must zero unread counts for selected threads and increment unread only for other-user realtime messages in unselected threads.
Mail HTML must be sanitized and attachment downloads must use backend-issued download URLs only.
Corporate mail is platform-operated out of the box; tenant users and admins must not enter SMTP/IMAP hostnames, ports, or passwords in the console.
Mail send/reply/forward is MailUse-gated and rate-limited per org/user; mailbox readiness is shown in /mail without exposing a separate server-settings route.
Calendar scopes must distinguish PERSONAL, TEAM, DEPARTMENT, ORG, and TENANT with explicit policy metadata and object links.
Poll votes must preserve eligibility/anonymity/audit semantics and prevent duplicate/invalid option voting server-side.
Mobile approval and poll vote actions require passkey step-up envelopes before sensitive actions are replayed.
Mobile notifications must track unread/urgent badge counts and route to work hub, approvals, work orders, messenger, mail, calendar, or poll objects.
Offline mobile messenger and sensitive actions must queue with idempotent request IDs and replay instead of dropping field work.
Live SMTP/IMAP/push/mobile production rollout must not be claimed before G009 live evidence.
